title: Remove File upload tab; make File dockable in board mode
prompt:
Two changes to the File surface in web-ui:

1) Remove the separate 上传 (upload) TAB — but KEEP upload and download functionality. The File filesystem view currently has two sub-tabs (文件系统 / 上传). Remove the 上传 sub-tab so there is no separate upload tab, and collapse away the now-single-tab switcher (no leftover tab chrome). CRITICAL: the filesystem itself must still support BOTH upload and download. Integrate upload and download into the 文件系统 explorer view directly instead of as a separate tab — e.g. via toolbar buttons, context-menu actions, and/or OS drag-in upload — reusing the existing workspaceFs.uploadFile path and the existing download path. Do not remove the upload/download capability; only remove the dedicated tab. Keep read/edit/create/rename/move/delete filesystem explorer functionality intact.

2) In board mode, File should be positioned like the Kanban agent sidebar: anchored in the top-right corner and dockable to either the left or right side. Mirror the existing dockable-home-chat-panel behavior (left/right docking) for the File surface so users can toggle its side. Reuse the existing dock/anchor pattern rather than inventing a new one.

Context pointers: the File surface lives under web-ui/src/components/file-surface/ and the filesystem explorer / upload code (workspaceFs tRPC, FileTree, upload dialog, download path). The dockable panel reference is the home chat dockable panel (left/right/float, react-rnd for float). Match existing design tokens and UI primitives per AGENTS.md.

Verify web:typecheck passes and the File surface still opens, reads, edits, uploads, and downloads files after the changes.
